name: Change Admin Password and Update Profile
description: Log in to the SEB Server at http://localhost:8080 using the default credentials (super-admin / admin) to perform security hardening on the 'super-admin' account. Update the account profile with the First Name 'System', Surname 'Administrator', Email 'admin@university-testing.edu', Language 'English', and Timezone 'America/New_York'. Change the account password to 'SEB_Secure#2024'.
